page_metadata.biotools__summary: CoV2K is a knowledge base of SARS-CoV-2 sequence mutations, variants, and their effects; it is available for exploration as a graph that can be queried through a RESTful API addressing single entities or paths through their relationships.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CoV2K is a knowledge base of SARS-CoV-2 sequence mutations, variants, and their effects; it is available for exploration as a graph that can be queried through a RESTful API addressing single entities or paths through their relationships.
